title: Example: How to reset software settings
content:
Q: How do I reset the software to default settings?
A: Open the app > Go to Settings > Click 'Reset to Defaults' > Confirm the reset. This will restore all settings to their factory defaults without deleting your data.

title: Example: System requirements
content:
Q: What are the system requirements?
A: Windows 10 or later (64-bit), macOS 10.15 or later. Minimum 4GB RAM, 500MB disk space. Internet connection required for activation.
